steps.title: Use the initial value
steps.content: The equation must have initial value $q(0)=18$, so the coefficient should be $18$.

steps.title: Find the decay factor
steps.content:
A $35\%$ decrease means each value keeps $65\%$ of the previous value.
$$100\%-35\%=65\%=0.65$$

steps.title: Build the exponential model
steps.content:
Use the initial value as the coefficient and the decay factor as the base.
$$q(x)=18(0.65)^x$$
The answer is C.
